item.title: Torrent Power Ltd Falls 15.04%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Torrent Power Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its share price declining by 15.04% to close at Rs.1,465.40, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The stock faced sustained selling pressure amid mixed fundamental updates, technical momentum shifts, and broader market volatility, despite an earlier upgrade by MarketsMOJO signalling improved valuation and financial metrics. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: V-Guard Industries Ltd Declines 3.35%: Key Financial and Technical Shifts Shape the Week
item.description: V-Guard Industries Ltd closed the week at Rs.320.25, down 3.35% from Rs.331.35 last Friday, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The stock experienced notable volatility amid a series of significant developments including a strong quarterly earnings report, technical rating shifts, and a valuation upgrade by MarketsMOJO. Despite the weekly decline, the company’s improved financial metrics and cautious upgrade to a Hold rating suggest a complex but evolving outlook for investors. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Intellect Design Arena Ltd Falls 14.75%: Valuation Shifts and Mixed Financial Signals Drive Weekly Decline
item.description: Intellect Design Arena Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its share price declining sharply by 14.75% to close at ₹688.05, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a volatile price trajectory influenced by rating upgrades and downgrades from MarketsMOJO, shifting valuation assessments, and subdued financial performance, all contributing to a cautious market sentiment. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Z F Steering Gear Declines 9.99%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Slide
item.description: Z F Steering Gear (India) Ltd experienced a turbulent week, closing down 9.99% from Rs.799.00 to Rs.719.15, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 2.63% decline over the same period. The week was marked by sharp price swings, with the stock initially rallying on 11 May before succumbing to margin pressures, technical downgrades, and valuation reassessments that influenced investor sentiment and trading activity. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: PC Jeweller Ltd Falls 11.99%: 7 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Decline
item.description: PC Jeweller Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its share price declining sharply by 11.99% to close at Rs.8.37, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. Despite intermittent volume surges and technical rating changes, the stock remained entrenched in a bearish trend amid sectoral headwinds and mixed fundamental signals. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Sudal Industries Declines 10.28%: Valuation Upgrade Amid Earnings Pressure
item.description: Sudal Industries Ltd’s shares declined 10.28% over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.51.59 from Rs.57.50 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s 2.63% fall, reflecting mixed investor sentiment amid valuation upgrades and disappointing quarterly results. The stock’s week was marked by a shift to a very attractive valuation rating and a cautious upgrade in investment grade, offset by ongoing earnings challenges and promoter share pledging concerns. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Rasayan Declines 4.12%: Valuation and Technical Shifts Mark a Challenging Week
item.description: Bharat Rasayan Ltd’s stock declined by 4.12% over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at ₹1,385.50 compared to ₹1,445.05 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s 2.63% fall, signalling a more pronounced weakness in the agrochemical small-cap amid valuation recalibrations and mixed technical momentum. The week was marked by a shift in valuation attractiveness, technical trend moderation, and persistent sector headwinds. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Arrow Greentech Declines 16.77%: Valuation and Technical Shifts Shape the Week
item.description: Arrow Greentech Ltd’s stock declined sharply by 16.77% over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.483.55 from Rs.580.95 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the broader Sensex’s 2.63% fall, highlighting significant stock-specific pressures amid mixed technical signals and valuation concerns. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Tree House Education Falls 3.90%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Tree House Education & Accessories Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price declining by 3.90% from ₹8.21 to ₹7.89, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by two lower circuit hits amid heavy selling pressure, a cautious upgrade in rating from 'Strong Sell' to 'Sell', and persistent fundamental weaknesses that continue to weigh on investor sentiment. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Oasis Securities Declines 1.91% Amid Valuation Concerns and Mixed Returns
item.description: Oasis Securities Ltd experienced a challenging week, closing at Rs.15.40 on 15 May 2026, down 1.91% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.15.70. This underperformance came despite the broader Sensex falling 2.63% over the same period, indicating a relatively resilient but still negative trend for the micro-cap NBFC. Key developments including disappointing Q4 FY26 results and a shift in valuation metrics to expensive territory influenced investor sentiment throughout the week. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Consumer Products Gains 4.95%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Tata Consumer Products Ltd delivered a solid weekly gain of 4.95%, closing at Rs.1,234.20 on 15 May 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s resilience amid a broadly weak market was driven by a series of technical breakouts, strong financial results, and heightened market participation, marking a week of notable milestones and evolving investor sentiment. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Vodafone Idea Ltd Gains 15.20%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Rally
item.description: Vodafone Idea Ltd delivered a remarkable weekly performance from 11 to 15 May 2026, surging 15.20% to close at Rs.12.96, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock demonstrated strong resilience amid a broadly bearish market, hitting multiple 52-week highs and attracting exceptional trading volumes, signalling renewed investor interest despite ongoing sector challenges. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Escorts Kubota Ltd Falls 4.70%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Escorts Kubota Ltd’s shares declined by 4.70% over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.3,000.80 compared to Rs.3,148.80 the previous Friday. This underperformance was sharper than the Sensex’s 2.63% fall, reflecting intensified selling pressure amid bearish technical signals, a downgrade in mojo rating, and a valuation reset. The week was marked by significant intraday volatility and a shift in market sentiment, with the stock trading below key moving averages and facing sectoral headwinds. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Viji Finance Ltd Drops 11.61%: 5 Key Events Shaping This Week’s Decline
item.description: Viji Finance Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 11 to 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.3.96, down 11.61% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.4.48. This decline notably outpaced the Sensex’s 2.63% fall over the same period, reflecting intense selling pressure and volatility in the micro-cap NBFC stock amid sectoral headwinds and liquidity challenges. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: OnMobile Global Ltd Falls 3.38%: Downgrade and Mixed Technical Signals Shape the Week
item.description: OnMobile Global Ltd closed the week at Rs.55.25, down 3.38% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.57.18, marginally underperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a significant downgrade to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO, reflecting deteriorating technical momentum and persistent financial challenges. Despite some short-term positive momentum indicators, the stock faced selling pressure amid mixed technical signals and cautious investor sentiment. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Rajoo Engineers Ltd Falls 9.45%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Rajoo Engineers Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price declining 9.45% from ₹61.78 to ₹55.94, underperforming the broader Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a shift from tentative technical recovery to renewed bearish momentum, a downgrade in technical ratings, and a recalibration of valuation metrics amid mixed market returns. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Automotive Stampings & Assemblies Ltd Falls 12.78%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Automotive Stampings & Assemblies Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price declining by 12.78% from Rs.548.50 to Rs.478.40, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 2.63% fall over the same period. The week was marked by sharp daily drops, mixed technical signals, and a downgrade in analyst sentiment, reflecting a complex interplay of strong fundamentals tempered by market caution and valuation concerns. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Sanco Industries Gains 9.40%: 4 Key Events Driving the Week’s Volatility
item.description: Sanco Industries Ltd delivered a notable weekly gain of 9.40%, closing at Rs.3.49 on 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s volatile week was marked by alternating upper and lower circuit hits, reflecting intense buying and selling pressures amid a subdued broader market environment. This review analyses the key events driving the stock’s price action and their implications for investors. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Jubilant Foodworks Declines 2.75%: Technical Weakness and Valuation Shift Shape the Week
item.description: Jubilant Foodworks Ltd closed the week ending 15 May 2026 at ₹460.30, down 2.75% from the previous Friday’s close of ₹473.30. This decline slightly outpaced the BSE Sensex’s 2.63% fall over the same period, reflecting a week marked by bearish technical signals, a valuation reassessment, and a downgrade in analyst sentiment. Despite some short-term price recoveries midweek, the stock struggled to sustain momentum amid broader market volatility and sector headwinds. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Cummins India Ltd. Edges Lower 0.18% Despite Sector Outperformance: 2 Key Market Moves This Week
item.description: Cummins India Ltd. closed the week marginally lower by 0.18% at Rs.5,388.85, underperforming the broader Sensex which declined 2.63%. The stock experienced notable volatility, with a sharp decline early in the week followed by a strong rebound midweek, reflecting mixed investor sentiment amid sectoral and market headwinds. Time: 47 minutes ago
